Tagging Details.Summary: Use of land pursuant to agreement
Tagging Details.Toc: Article 33. Land Utilization in Special Protected Areas
Tagging Details.Primary Tag Details: 1. Land can be used by citizens, business entities, and organizations of Mongolia in limited zones of strictly protected areas and national parks, nature reserves, and monuments for certain purposes for certain periods under certain conditions on the basis of agreement in manners that are not harmful to the environment.
